a.xlink:title: Computes the Alpha parameter for the RICCA condition based on input variables.
Computes the dissipative flux for a given cell and face using the RICCA method.
Computes the dissipative flux for a given cell and face using the second-order RICCA method.
Evaluates the first-order net flux for all cells in the computational domain.
Evaluates the net flux for each cell using a second-order flux calculation method.
